title: BlockPixel
description: This is a Minecraft pixel texture pack created by Jakob.zero, characterized by using variously sized block patterns as the foundation for its pixel textures, highlighting the unique charm of the blocky world.
body:
![Texture Pack Title](https://s2.loli.net/2024/05/11/Kz5Uv1oRg8LDFyB.png 'BlockPIxel')  


# BlockPixel Texture Pack

BlockPixel: Founded in 2011  
The moment I first encountered Minecraft, my perspective on everything shifted. The vivid world of Minecraft, where everything is square and even the impossible feels real, became the most striking image in my imagination. These unforgettable experiences inspired me to create BlockPixel, a project dedicated to showcasing the charm of square textures and exploring the unique appeal of Minecraft.

## Additional Content

This is a Christmas add-on designed for survival adventures, adding more festive atmosphere without altering the recognizability of original blocks and items. The content is currently limited but will continue to grow, including additions like villagers and mobs. Please ensure it is loaded on top of the BlockPixel texture pack.  
[![BlockPixel Christmas](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/05bd31c81235e22a2084a143f0c04a95b8cb25b7.png)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/blockpixel-christmas-addon)◀◀
